Class BandsInputTerminal

java.lang.Object
common.BandsInputTerminal
public class BandsInputTerminal extends Object
Provides interactive terminal input for creating MusicBand objects. Handles prompting the user for each field, validating input, and constructing the corresponding MusicBand instance. Implements the Singleton pattern to ensure a single point of terminal-based band input.

    Method

    Prompts the user via the provided Scanner to enter all fields of a MusicBand, using a manually specified ID instead of generating a new one.

    Prompts the user via the provided Scanner to enter all fields of a MusicBand.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static BandsInputTerminal getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of BandsInputTerminal.
      Returns:
      the singleton instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the instance has not been initialized

    • initialize

      public static void initialize()
      Initializes the singleton instance of BandsInputTerminal. Must be called once before using the instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the instance has already been initialized

    • inputBand

      public MusicBand inputBand(Scanner scanner)
      Prompts the user via the provided Scanner to enter all fields of a MusicBand. Generates a new ID automatically.
      Parameters:
      scanner - the Scanner to read user input from
      Returns:
      a newly created MusicBand object with the entered data

    • inputBand

      public MusicBand inputBand(int ID, Scanner scanner)
      Prompts the user via the provided Scanner to enter all fields of a MusicBand, using a manually specified ID instead of generating a new one.
      Parameters:
      ID - the ID to assign to the MusicBand
      scanner - the Scanner to read user input from
      Returns:
      a newly created MusicBand object with the entered data and the given ID
